description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image. Define three stages: lint, test, and deploy. Add a lint job named lint that runs python setup.py flake8 in the lint stage. Add a test job named test that runs python setup.py test in the test stage. Add a documentation test job named doc-test in the test stage that first runs pip install -r requirements_dev.txt then executes sphinx-build -nW -b html -d docs/_build/doctrees docs/ docs/_build/html. Add a documentation build job named doc-build in the deploy stage that triggers a Read the Docs build with curl -X POST http://readthedocs.org/build/sir-bot-a-lot and configure it to run only on the master branch.
